summary: Comprehensive testing of GIG ZipFinder requested features: 'Comprar Ahora' button scroll, Google Voice removal, purchase flow, dashboard, and language support. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not validate terms_accepted field - creates checkout even when terms_accepted=false
Terms content still mentions 'Google Voice' in both EN and ES versions (DEFAULT_TERMS_EN and DEFAULT_TERMS_ES constants)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add validation for terms_accepted in /api/web/create-checkout-session endpoint
OPTIONAL: Update DEFAULT_TERMS_EN and DEFAULT_TERMS_ES in server.py to remove 'Google Voice' references
NOTE: Stripe is using LIVE keys - test cards will NOT work until switched to TEST keys
critical_code_review_comments: Terms & conditions content (DEFAULT_TERMS_EN/ES in server.py) still mentions 'Google Voice' - though frontend doesn't display it directly
Web checkout endpoint should validate terms_accepted=true before creating session
seed_data_creation: None - existing ZIP codes and guides used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Core features verified: 1) 'Comprar Ahora' button scrolls to #buy-now section correctly 2) No 'Google Voice' text in visible frontend pages (Hero, Purchase, Dashboard) 3) AppSelection section shows 3 app cards (Instacart, DoorDash, Spark) at $20 each 4) Purchase flow works - Stripe checkout session created successfully 5) Dashboard shows 'Sin acceso' for unpaid users 6) Language selector visible with flags. Note: Stripe LIVE keys are configured - test cards won't work.

comprar_ahora_button.details: Button found in Hero, scrolls page from position 0 to 3314 (to #buy-now section)

google_voice_removal.details: No 'Google Voice' text found on homepage, purchase page, or dashboard

app_selection_section.details: Section with id='buy-now' found, contains Instacart/DoorDash/Spark cards at $20 each

purchase_flow.details: Navigation to /purchase/instacart works, Stripe checkout session created successfully

dashboard_access_control.details: Unpaid users see 'Sin acceso. Realiza la compra primero.' with 'Comprar Acceso' button

payment_success_error_handling.details: Invalid session shows 'Error en la Verificación' with 'Volver al Inicio' button

language_support.details: Language selector with globe icon and flags visible in header

stripe_integration.details: Checkout session created with LIVE keys, returns valid Stripe checkout URL

ai_zip_search.details: AI ZIP search endpoint working with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY

backend_test_results.failure_details: test_create_checkout_session_without_terms - endpoint allows checkout without terms (validation issue)

notes_for_user.stripe_mode: LIVE keys configured - use TEST keys (sk_test_*, pk_test_*) to test with 4242 4242 4242 4242
notes_for_user.emergent_llm_key: Currently uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for AI features - can be replaced with user's OPENAI_API_KEY
notes_for_user.independence: System is fully deployable independently on Railway with own MongoDB and Stripe accounts
